risk_description: Unauthorized access to EHR production databases
treatment_plan: MFA + CyberArk PAM + quarterly access reviews + audit logging

risk_description: PHI breach via misconfigured API endpoint
treatment_plan: API security gateway + input validation + PHI detection scanning + WAF
notes: API pentest Q4: no PHI exposure findings

risk_description: EHR platform outage during clinical hours
notes: DR test Q4: RTO 11 minutes. Zero unplanned outages.

treatment_plan: CrowdStrike EDR + network segmentation + immutable backups + Mandiant retainer + quarterly tabletop

risk_description: Failure to meet HIPAA breach notification 60-day deadline
treatment_plan: Documented IR procedures + HHS notification templates + legal counsel retainer + quarterly drills
notes: Notification drill Nov 18: completed in simulated 22 days.

risk_description: PHI exposure through business associate breach
treatment_plan: BAA enforcement + annual BA assessments + BitSight monitoring + breach notification clauses
Checksums + transaction logging + daily integrity audits + point-in-time recovery
notes: Zero integrity alerts Q4. Daily audit reports clean.

risk_description: Insider threat — clinician accessing records outside treatment relationship
treatment_plan: Break-the-glass access controls + audit logging + UBA + quarterly access reviews
notes: 2 break-the-glass events Q4 — both legitimate emergency access.

treatment_plan: Network segmentation + input validation + migration to FHIR R4 planned Q2 2026

risk_description: State health privacy law compliance gaps (CMIA/SHIELD Act)
treatment_plan: Legal monitoring + OneTrust consent management + quarterly compliance reviews
notes: OneTrust updated for CMIA amendments Q3.

treatment_plan: Wiz CSPM + auto-remediation + IaC enforcement + PHI detection scanning
notes: Wiz auto-remediated 3 S3 bucket misconfigs Q4.
